prompt: Compare @alpha_macro, @beta_bits, @chart_clara, @deltafund and @equity_ed over the last 180 days. Rank how reliable their calls were, show the strongest and weakest calls, and be honest if X did not return the whole window. I have never run Called It locally before.
assertions: Explains read-only local browser-session use, local normalized storage, possible X rate limits, and best-effort coverage before the first scan.
Uses called-it doctor and called-it analyze rather than Bird or another X provider directly.
Requests one explicit browser source and profile without asking for cookie values.
Ranks only comparable handles and includes sample sizes, requested versus observed coverage, partial handles, and a financial-advice disclaimer.
